title: QE Trainer Curriculum
description: Adaptive Quality Engineering curriculum built from Jacob's own reference books.

physics_materials.blurb: Physics & materials fundamentals — the engineering bedrock.

spc.blurb: Statistical Process Control — variation, control charts, capability.

process_variation.blurb: Process variation & reduction — dominant cause, families, the SE algorithm.

capability.blurb: Capability & validation — Cp/Cpk/Pp/Ppk, sigma level, IQ/OQ/PQ, PPAP, sampling.

msa.blurb: Measurement systems analysis — bias, Gauge R&R, attribute agreement, ndc.

doe.blurb: Design of experiments — factorials, interactions, screening, confirmation runs.

gdt.blurb: GD&T / dimensional metrology — datums, tolerancing, position.

fmea.blurb: FMEA — failure modes, S/O/D, Action Priority.

apqp.blurb: APQP & core tools — PPAP, control plans, MSA.

sevenD.blurb: Structured problem solving — GM 7-Diamonds, 5 Whys, PCB.
